title: data-us pack=comps-multiples output
description: Pack output for `data-us/scripts/pack.py --ticker {T} --pack comps-multiples` (anchor only) OR `--tickers T1,T2,...` (peers). Filters yfinance info to the multiples-only field set: trailingPE, forwardPE, priceToSales, priceToBook, enterpriseToEbitda, enterpriseToRevenue, marketCap, enterpriseValue. Tier 2 (yfinance unofficial).

tickers.description: Map of upper-case ticker → multiples fields. Empty `{}` when batch fetch failed entirely (top-level `error` then carries the client error blob).

additionalProperties.description: Per-ticker multiples slice. Missing fields surface as null (not omitted).

error.description: Top-level client error blob when batch fetch failed entirely. `tickers` will be `{}` in that case. Aligned with shared error envelope.
